junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with dependencies requiring Java 17.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 imports with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) imports to support the new testing framework.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, junit.framework.TestCase) are not part of JUnit 5 and will cause compilation errors if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if the code is expected to run on JUnit 5 platform.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove inheritance from junit.framework.TestCase as JUnit 5 tests do not require a base class.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: junit.framework.TestCase is a JUnit 4 class; keeping it implies JUnit 4 dependency and style, which is incompatible with a pure JUnit 5 migration.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 setUp() method with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize the setUp() method from TestCase; it requires @BeforeEach annotation for setup logic.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 tearDown() method with JUnit 5 @AfterEach annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize the tearDown() method from TestCase; it requires @AfterEach annotation for teardown logic.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @BeforeClass are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @After are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @AfterClass are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 API classes instead of JUnit 4.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 engine in a pure JUnit 5 setup.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update static imports to use JUnit 5 Assertions class.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4 and may not be present or compatible in a JUnit 5 only environment.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(MockitoJUnitRunner.class) with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize JUnit 4's @RunWith annotation; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without migrating to @ExtendWith.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 Mockito integration to JUnit 5 Mockito integration.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: The class org.mockito.junit.MockitoJUnitRunner is not part of the JUnit 5 ecosystem and may not be available or compatible; org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension is the required replacement.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test annotation with JUnit 5 @Test annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Test is from JUnit 4 and is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine; tests will not run without switching to org.junit.jupiter.api.Test.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 Assert static imports with JUnit 5 Assertions static imports.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is from JUnit 4; using it with JUnit 5 tests may lead to compilation errors if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or runtime failures if assertions are not recognized by the engine.
